summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: a top row of 5 people (labeled A-E) as lettered Circles. Below, a 5-column grid of 10 miniature-scaled copies of the row (via helper make_row(highlight=set)) with the chosen 3 rendered YELLOW fill and excluded 2 faded GREY_B — every element of C(5,3). YELLOW subset label in {·,·,·} under each mini-row. Bottom MathTex formula C(5,3) = 5!/(3!2!) = 10 boxed in YELLOW SurroundingRectangle.
